# @beinfi/pulse-sdk

> TypeScript SDK for the Pulse Payment Platform. Create payment links,
> process crypto payments (USDC/USDT on Solana) and PIX payments,
> verify webhooks, and embed checkout widgets.
> Zero runtime dependencies.

## Getting Started
- [README](README.md): Installation, quick start, and full API reference
- [Quickstart Guide](docs/quickstart.md): Complete integration walkthrough
- [Publishing Guide](COMO_PUBLICAR.md): How to publish to npm

## API Reference
- [Types](src/types.ts): All TypeScript interfaces (PulseConfig, PaymentLink, PaymentIntent, Webhook, etc.)
- [Payment Links](src/resources/payment-links.ts): Create, list, get payment links and their intents
- [Webhooks](src/resources/webhooks.ts): Create, list, delete webhook subscriptions
- [Webhook Verification](src/webhooks/verify.ts): HMAC-SHA256 signature verification
- [Checkout Widget](src/checkout/checkout.ts): Embed iframe-based checkout
- [Checkout Types](src/checkout/types.ts): CheckoutMountOptions, CheckoutTheme, CheckoutInstance
- [Errors](src/errors.ts): PulseError, PulseApiError, PulseAuthenticationError, PulseRateLimitError
- [HTTP Client](src/client.ts): Low-level fetch wrapper with auth and error handling

## OpenAPI Specification
- [OpenAPI 3.1 Spec](openapi.yaml): Full API specification for the Pulse backend

## Agent Context
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Universal AI agent instructions
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Claude-specific context

## Examples
- [Next.js Checkout Example](examples/nextjs-checkout/): Full working example app
